arts.ttl: Vital Man United ace “extremely disappointed” and confirms he’s out injured “for some time”
arts.sum: In a shattering blow for both player and club, Man United’s brilliant winger, Amad Diallo, has confirmed that he’ll be out injured for some time. arts.ttl: BREAKING: Amad releases emotional statement after suffering devastating Man Utd injury blow
arts.sum: Amad looks set to spend a large chunk of the remainder of the campaign sidelined with an ankle ligament injury and the Manchester United wonderkid has spoken out

arts.ttl: Sources: Amad Diallo could miss rest of season
arts.sum: Amad Diallo has suffered an ankle ligament injury in training with Manchester United and could miss the rest of the season, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Man Utd leave fans furious with awkward Kobbie Mainoo social media post

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim left to regret two ruthless Man Utd decisions after latest blow
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has suffered a major blow after Amad picked up an ankle injury in training that could see him miss the remainder of the campaign

arts.ttl: Has Ruben Amorim made Man United worse? JAMES SHARPE examines the system that players are questioning and finds an alarming conclusion for fans
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: Amorim is only 20 games into his reign but, as Mail Sport revealed this week, some of his players are already wondering whether a change of plan might be in order.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy could step aside from Tottenham role on one condition
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur chairman Daniel Levy has been heavily criticised in recent years for the way he has run the club. He has been accused of lacking ambition and some of his major decisions have been questioned by the fans and the media as well. arts.ttl: Man United could be missing 10 players against Tottenham as attacker suffers potential 'season-ending injury'
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly suffer a devastating injury blow over key attacker Amad Diallo, who could miss the remainder of the 2024-25 season with an ankle problem.

arts.ttl: Another injury blow for Manchester United as Amad Diallo suffers ankle damage
arts.sum: The 22-year-old has been one of the few bright points for the Red Devils this season.
